option.name: cargoVersion
option.value: [0m[1m[31merror: [0mrustup could not choose a version of cargo to run, because one wasn't specified explicitly, and no default is configured.

option.name: rustcVersion
option.value: [0m[1m[31merror: [0mrustup could not choose a version of rustc to run, because one wasn't specified explicitly, and no default is configured.
